findings.description: The NC Energy, Mineral & Land Resources logo/graphic present in the PDF header is missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 has the NC tree logo and 'Energy, Mineral & Land Resources' branding graphic in the top-left corner. The HTML version only shows the text 'NC Energy, Mineral & Land Resources' without the logo image.

findings.description: The memo header fields (To, From, Subject) lose their tabular/aligned layout in HTML.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, 'To:', 'From:', 'Subject:' are left-aligned labels with content indented to form aligned columns. In HTML, these are rendered as simple inline text without the structured alignment.

findings.description: The outline list in the PDF uses Roman numerals with tab-aligned descriptions, but in the HTML the alignment differs slightly. The bullet list items in section I use filled circles in HTML versus simple bullet dots in the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 uses simple bullet points (•) for the CAMA process list. HTML uses filled circle bullet markers. Both are lists but the bullet style differs slightly.
